notes:
Created src/renderer/game/dev/phaserHmr.js exporting registerSceneHmr(sceneKey, hot, sceneClass, exportName='default'). It no-ops when import.meta.hot is falsy (production), reads window.__phaserGame (already exposed by GameContainer.jsx in dev), and on accept does game.scene.remove(KEY) + game.scene.add(KEY, NewClass, true). All console paths are guarded with try/catch.

Registered scenes (15 total, sceneKey → file): OverworldScene → scenes/OverworldScene.js; ZuzuGarageScene → scenes/ZuzuGarageScene.js; StreetBlockScene → scenes/StreetBlockScene.js; DogParkScene → scenes/DogParkScene.js; LakeEdgeScene → scenes/LakeEdgeScene.js; SportsFieldsScene → scenes/SportsFieldsScene.js; CommunityPoolScene → scenes/CommunityPoolScene.js; DesertTrailScene → scenes/DesertTrailScene.js; MountainScene → scenes/MountainScene.js; WorldMapScene → scenes/WorldMapScene.js; DesertForagingScene → scenes/DesertForagingScene.js; CopperMineScene → scenes/CopperMineScene.js; SaltRiverScene → scenes/SaltRiverScene.js; GarageScene → scenes/GarageScene.js (legacy); NeighborhoodScene → scenes/NeighborhoodScene.js (legacy). Keys verified by reading each file's super('...') call or const SCENE_KEY = '...' — not guessed from filename. All 15 are referenced in src/renderer/game/config.js ALL_SCENES array, so they are real Phaser-registered scenes.

Skipped files (abstract base classes, never passed to game.scene.add): scenes/LocalSceneBase.js — only extended by other scenes (Phaser.Scene base for ZuzuGarage/StreetBlock/DogPark/LakeEdge/SportsFields/CommunityPool/DesertTrail/Mountain), not in config.js; scenes/BaseSubScene.js — only extended by world-map sub-scenes (DesertForaging/CopperMine/SaltRiver), not in config.js. Confirmed via Grep against src/renderer/game/config.js, systems/sceneRegistry.js, and the entire src tree — neither name appears in any game.scene.add(...) call. BasePlayableScene.js does not exist.

GameContainer.jsx not touched — the lean fix exposing window.__phaserGame in dev was already in place. The bridge reads it directly.

Static checks:
- npm run build: SUCCESS (10.58s, no warnings related to HMR; the only warnings are pre-existing chunk-size and dynamic-import notices from GamePage/Game3DPage). Production build correctly tree-shakes the HMR block (early return when import.meta.hot is undefined).
- npm run lint: 259 pre-existing errors across the repo (none introduced by this patch). For the 16 files I touched, lint shows zero new errors. Pre-existing issues in three of my touched files (scenes/GarageScene.js EXIT_ZONE_HEIGHT unused, scenes/StreetBlockScene.js getQuestBoard unused, scenes/WorldMapScene.js REGIONS/getLocationsByRegion unused) are unrelated to HMR wiring and were left alone per scope rules. The new helper src/renderer/game/dev/phaserHmr.js lints clean.

Follow-ups (out of scope this cycle):
- Sub-scene HMR: BaseSubScene-derived scenes are launched by parents; reloading the parent scene reloads its children. Acceptable for now.
- In-scene state persistence across hot-swap: Phaser starts scenes fresh on add(); player position is reset. game.registry survives because it lives on the Game. If stateful HMR is wanted, snapshot scene.player.{x,y} into game.registry before remove() and restore in create() — separate cycle.
- The unused-but-reserved _sceneClass parameter in registerSceneHmr is left in for future diagnostics (e.g., name comparison against newModule[exportName]); guarded with eslint-disable-next-line no-unused-vars.
